results.rendered_html:
kumudvat a. Abounding in lotuses; kumudvatsu ca vāriṣu  R. 4. 19. 
— tī
1 A water-lily with white flowers (opening at moon-rise); aṃtarhite śaśini saiva kumudvatī me dṛṣṭiṃ na naṃdayati saṃsmaraṇīyaśobhā  Ś. 4. 2 ; 3. 17 ; kumudvatī bhānumatīva bhāvaṃ (na babaṃdha)  R. 6. 36. 
2 A collection of lotuses.
3 A place abounding in lotuses. ˚īśaḥ the moon.
